methods.name: createApplication
methods.desc: Deploy the contract; GlobalState values are auto-initialized.

methods.name: bootstrap

args.name: quorum
args.desc: - minimum yes-votes required to execute a proposal

args.name: votingPeriod
args.desc: - number of rounds a proposal stays open for voting

methods.desc: Configure DAO parameters (quorum and voting period); creator-only, one-time setup.

methods.name: propose
methods.desc: Submit a new proposal and emit a ProposalCreated event; returns the proposal ID.

methods.name: vote

args.name: proposalId
args.desc: - the ID of the proposal to vote on

args.name: inFavor
args.desc: - true for yes, false for no

methods.desc: Cast a yes/no vote on an open proposal with deduplication.

methods.name: execute

args.name: proposalId
args.desc: - the ID of the proposal to execute

methods.desc: Execute a proposal that reached quorum after voting ends.

methods.name: tally

returns.desc: the number of proposals that reached the quorum threshold

methods.desc: Count and return the number of proposals that met quorum.

methods.name: close
methods.desc: Shut down the DAO, delete all proposal boxes, and emit a DaoClosed event; creator-only.
